summary: #71619 remains the best live canonical PR for the Linux hardened minimal service PATH work. Closed PRs #71964 and #72109 are historical related context for the existence-gated fallback-path sub-scope and should stay closed; no close/comment/label mutation is planned from this dedupe-only pass.
